ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit or dataset */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit or dataset */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit or dataset */,
  "unit_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was created */,
  "unit_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit or dataset */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Current status of the unit */,
  "unit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in terms of number of records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the worker is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the worker is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the worker is located */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address of the worker */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score of the worker */,
  "worker_status" TEXT /* Current status of the worker */,
  "worker_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the worker */,
  "worker_education" TEXT /* Education level of the worker */,
  "worker_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the worker */,
  "worker_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the channel */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Current status of the channel */,
  "channel_security" TEXT /* Security measures in place for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of the term (e.g., disease, symptom, finding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "term_source" TEXT /* Source of the term */,
  "term_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the term in the dataset */,
  "term_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the term's accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "term1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first term in the relationship */,
  "term2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second term in the relationship */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., diagnosed by, may have) */,
  "relex_relcos" REAL /* Relational cosine similarity */,
  "twrex" TEXT /* Relationship type in TWREX format */,
  "relationship_source" TEXT /* Source of the relationship */,
  "relationship_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the relationship */,
  "relationship_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the relationship in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_term2_id FOREIGN KEY ("term2_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_term1_id FOREIGN KEY ("term1_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "sentence_text" TEXT /* Text of the sentence */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record containing the sentence */,
  "sentence_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentence */,
  "sentence_context" TEXT /* Context in which the sentence was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the record source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the source */,
  "source_reputation" REAL /* Reputation score of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken during the audit (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit action */,
  "audit_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the audit was performed */,
  "audit_device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the audit */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
